title: Block Party in the House
excerpt: Really enjoyed working with these kits this month. Ended up making 10 layouts using the Main kit , as well as add-on's Wildberry Court , Pioneer Drive, and Woodbrooke Road . Here is my main kit only layout: Love the…
body:
Really enjoyed working with these kits this month. Ended up making 10 layouts using the Main kit, as well as add-on's Wildberry Court, Pioneer Drive, and Woodbrooke Road. Here is my main kit only layout:

Love the piece of printed vellum as well as the blue twine that came in the kit. The chipboard Thickers are perfect for painting with acrylics. Once I finished the Main Kit Only layout, I started playing around with the Add-On's.

One of the best Christmas presents I received is from my dear friend Dana Colwell. While Mommy and I were in Maui, she arranged to get the dogs to her house to take some photos of them. I am blown away with her talent and her wicked gift-giving skills. Couldn't resist using this one:

For all the layouts, visit the gallery. supplies: Studio Calico January kits - Block Party Add Ons: Wildberry Court || Pioneer Drive || Woodbrooke Road
